recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: Final Exam
recommendations.overview: In a small college in North Carolina, only a select few students are left to take mid terms. But, when a killer strikes, it could be everyone's final exam.

recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Premature
recommendations.overview: On the most important day of his young life, a high school senior is forced to relive his failed attempt at losing his virginity over and over again, until he gets it right.
